name: DoD TAP Main Hub
whatItProvides: The main statutory transition program for separating or retiring military personnel. It is an outcome-based program under 10 U.S.C. Chapter 58.

name: TAP Class & Event Finder
whatItProvides: Search engine and locator for physical TAP classes, workshops, events, and online transition courses.

name: DoD TAP Core Curriculum
whatItProvides: Provides access to the foundational elements: DoD Transition Day, VA Benefits and Services briefing, and the Department of Labor One-Day curriculum.

name: DoD TAP Two-Day Tracks Comparison
whatItProvides: Comparison and alignment rules for the mandatory elective tracks: Higher Education, Vocational Training, Employment, and Entrepreneurship.

name: TAP Capstone Verification
whatItProvides: The final mandatory verification step where commanders confirm that the transitioning service member has met all Career Readiness Standards (CRS).

name: Career Readiness Standards (CRS)
whatItProvides: A set of mandatory deliverables (budget, resume, gap analysis, DD Form 2648) that verify a service member is prepared to transition.

name: Transition Online Learning (TOL)
whatItProvides: Web-based portal for completing TAP courses virtually when physical classes are unavailable or for review.

name: Yellow Ribbon Reintegration Program (YRRP) Courses
whatItProvides: Information and courses designed to support National Guard and Reserve members and their families during the deployment cycle.

name: Employer Support of the Guard and Reserve (ESGR) Resources
whatItProvides: Provides training, advocacy, and support regarding employment rights under USERRA for Reserve components.

name: SkillBridge Courses
whatItProvides: Access to educational materials, guidelines, and training resources regarding the DoD SkillBridge program.
